name: k/d + mobility dog food
description: nutrition has been the cornerstone of long-term support for pets with kidney conditions. nutrition can also play a key role in managing dogs' mobility, reducing clinical signs and improving weight-bearing ability in dogs. being proactive and managing both conditions with nutrition can have a lasting impact on dogs' health. prescription diet k/d + mobility combines the proven nutrition of prescription diet k/d for kidney care with the technology and efficacy of prescription diet j/d for mobility. it's formulated with activbiome+ kidney defense, a proprietary blend of prebiotics shown to nourish
